name: Circular dependency — tests cycle detection and graceful handling

input.userMessage: Map the component relationships for this file

components.name: CardA
components.description: A card that embeds a HeaderBar for its top section

components.name: HeaderBar
components.description: A horizontal bar with navigation items and a UserMenu dropdown

components.name: UserMenu
components.description: A dropdown menu that renders its content inside a CardA for visual consistency

components.name: Avatar
components.description: A simple image component with no children, used in UserMenu and HeaderBar

expectedBehaviors: Detects the circular dependency: CardA -> HeaderBar -> UserMenu -> CardA
Explicitly flags the cycle in the output (e.g., a 'cycles' or 'warnings' field)
Still produces a valid relationships.json — does not crash or hang
Lists which specific components form the cycle so the user can fix it
Correctly maps Avatar as a non-cyclic leaf component used by multiple parents
Does not silently omit any component from the output
antiPatterns: Infinite loop or timeout while traversing the dependency graph
Silently omits the cycle — produces output that looks correct but hides the problem
Drops one of the circular edges to 'fix' the cycle without telling the user
Only reports contains relationships and misses that Avatar is shared across components
Produces an empty or partial relationships.json

evaluationCriteria.cycleDetection: Does it explicitly identify the CardA -> HeaderBar -> UserMenu -> CardA cycle?
evaluationCriteria.outputValidity: Is the output a valid relationships.json with all 4 components present?
evaluationCriteria.userGuidance: Does it tell the user which components form the cycle so they can fix their Figma structure?
evaluationCriteria.nonCyclicAccuracy: Does it correctly handle Avatar as a normal leaf component despite the cycle elsewhere?
evaluationCriteria.noHang: Does the skill complete in a reasonable time without infinite recursion?
